description: A raw sales export at /home/ga/Documents/imports/legacy_sales_dump.csv contains messy formatting: dates are DD/MM/YYYY, amounts have currency symbols ($) and commas, and customer IDs are embedded in text strings (e.g., 'Name [ID:123]'). Import and normalize this data into a new table named 'clean_sales' within the Chinook SQLite database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db). The 'clean_sales' table must follow this schema: SaleId (INTEGER), SaleDate (TEXT, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD), CustomerId (INTEGER, extracted from the text), and SaleAmount (REAL/DOUBLE, numeric value only). Save the SQL script used for the transformation and table creation to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/clean_import.sql.
